title: Invisible Leaf Litter
description: This Resource Pack is making Leaf Litter Invisible because i dont like it
body:
**Invisible Falling Leaf litter**

You don´t like the new leaf litter because you like the old forest look more? But you still want to use the other new features like the happy ghast or the Copper Golem? So you can use this Resource Pack. It is only making leaf litter invisible so it is looking how it was before the Spring Drop. It is also not removing leaf liter as it because it is a Resource pack not a mod ,so you can still destroy it or pick it up, use it as a fuel or play on servers.

Make sure the resource pack is above the others.
(please try the datapacks of exp studio out.I like them and yeah.)
